message:
test(fcp-core): add Trust/Quorum Model unit tests and golden vectors

- Add comprehensive Byzantine fault tolerance tests (n/f assumptions)
- Add split-brain prevention tests for partition scenarios
- Add threshold rule and degraded mode semantic tests
- Add safety tier quorum verification tests
- Create CBOR golden vectors: quorum_3_of_3.cbor, quorum_3_of_5.cbor, degraded_state.cbor
- Add integration test with FCP2 logging requirements compliance
- Fix clippy warnings in panic test assertions
- Add ciborium dev-dependency for CBOR golden vector serialization

Closes flywheel_connectors-q10z

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,5 +30,6 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+ciborium.workspace = true
 semver.workspace = true
 tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"] }
